text: GG0100D_PRIOR_FNCTNL_CGNTN_IND GG0100D_PRIOR_FNCTNL_CGNTN_IND GG0100D Prior Functioning - Functional Cognition Code - The data in this column identifies the patient's need for assistance with planning regular tasks such as shopping or remembering to take medication prior to the current illness, exacerbation or injury.
